/usr/bin/ar qc libeuxis-bridge-cpp.a "CMakeFiles/euxis-bridge-cpp.dir/src/skill.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-bridge-cpp.dir/src/policy.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-bridge-cpp.dir/src/importer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-bridge-cpp.dir/src/parser.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-bridge-cpp.dir/src/verification.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-bridge-cpp.dir/src/static_analysis.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-bridge-cpp.dir/src/admission.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-bridge-cpp.dir/src/reputation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-bridge-cpp.dir/src/provenance.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-bridge-cpp.dir/src/audit.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-bridge-cpp.dir/src/executor.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-bridge-cpp.dir/src/platform_linux.cpp.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libeuxis-bridge-cpp.a
